case_title: EXYGY, LLC VS. ANDREW MCMANUS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANDREW MCMANUS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, IS CONTINUED FROM JUL-25-2012 TO LAW AND MOTION AT AUG-15-2012, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-15-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-24-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMANUS, ANDREW HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $410.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE OCT-18-2012, FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMANUS, ANDREW

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ANDREW MCMANUS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, AND SUSTAINED, WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Pistorino, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP, Tel. 650.838.4392, for Defendant and moving party;
Michael I. Burton, Esq. of Garteiser Honea, Tel. 415.320.0862, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. After argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANDREW MCMANUS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the first cause of action, and sustained, with 15 days leave to amend, as to the second cause of action. Order signed in open Court. (See signed order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
